zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Foljambe於1401年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，他的父親Thomas Foljambe56歲，母親Margaret Loudham41歲。他於大約1439年與Jane Ashton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1451年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年50歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Foljambe于1401年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，他的父亲Thomas Foljambe56岁，母亲Margaret Loudham41岁。他于大约1439年与Jane Ashton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1451年在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年50岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Foljambe was born in 1401, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Foljambe, was 56 and his mother, Margaret Loudham, was 41. He married Jane Ashton about 1439. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1451, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Foljambe est né en 1401, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Foljambe, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Margaret Loudham, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Jane Ashton environ 1439. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1451, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Foljambe 1401 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Foljambe 56 und seine Mutter Margaret Loudham 41. Er hat um 1439 Jane Ashton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1451 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Foljambe è nato il nel 1401 nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Foljambe, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Loudham, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Jane Ashton circa 1439. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1451, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Foljambeが1401年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Foljambeは56歳，母Margaret Loudhamは41歳であった。約1439年にJane Ashtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで50歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Foljambe(이)가 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Foljambe(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Loudham(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1439년 Jane Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Foljambe nasceu em 1401, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Foljambe, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Loudham, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Ashton aproximadamente 1439. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1451, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Foljambe родился в 1401 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Foljambe было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Loudham, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Ashton около 1439 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1451 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Foljambe nació en 1401, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Foljambe, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Margaret Loudham, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Jane Ashton aproximadamente 1439. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1451, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
